query_title: Unknown Number: The High School Catfish

recommendations.title: 13th
recommendations.overview: An in-depth look at the prison system in the United States and how it reveals the nation's history of racial inequality.

recommendations.title: Our Father
recommendations.overview: After a woman's at-home DNA test reveals multiple half-siblings, she discovers a shocking scheme involving donor sperm and a popular fertility doctor.

recommendations.title: The Menendez Brothers
recommendations.overview: Serving life in prison for murdering their parents, Lyle and Erik Menendez speak out in this documentary explaining the shocking crime and ensuing trials.

recommendations.title: The Three Deaths of Marisela Escobedo
recommendations.overview: After the death of her daughter at the hand of her boyfriend, Marisela Escobedo began to fight for justice not only against the murderer but also against the corrupt Mexican judicial system.

recommendations.title: Cowspiracy: The Sustainability Secret
recommendations.overview: Follow the shocking, yet humorous, journey of an aspiring environmentalist, as he daringly seeks to find the real solution to the most pressing environmental issues and true path to sustainability.

recommendations.title: No Half Measures: Creating the Final Season of Breaking Bad
recommendations.overview: A documentary about the making of season five of the acclaimed AMC series Breaking Bad.

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: Baraka
recommendations.overview: A paralysingly beautiful documentary with a global vision—an odyssey through landscape and time—that attempts to capture the essence of life.

recommendations.title: The Perfect Neighbor
recommendations.overview: Police bodycam footage reveals how a long-running neighborhood dispute turned fatal in this documentary about fear, prejudice and Stand Your Ground laws.

recommendations.title: Shiny_Flakes: The Teenage Drug Lord
recommendations.overview: Max S. reveals how he built a drug empire from his childhood bedroom in this story that inspired the series "How to Sell Drugs Online."
